questions.question: What does 'नमस्कार' mean?
questions.explanation: नमस्कार (Namaskar) is the universal Marathi greeting.

questions.question: How do you say 'Good morning' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: सुप्रभात (Suprabhat) means Good morning.

questions.question: Which word means 'Thank you'?
questions.explanation: धन्यवाद (Dhanyavaad) means Thank you.

questions.question: How do you say 'Please' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: कृपया (Krupaya) means Please.

questions.question: What does 'ठीक आहे' mean?
questions.explanation: ठीक आहे (Theek aahe) means Okay or All right.

questions.question: 'कसे आहात?' is used to ask:
questions.explanation: कसे आहात? (Kase aahat?) means How are you? — formal form.

questions.question: A male speaker says goodbye by saying:
questions.explanation: येतो (Yeto) is the casual goodbye said by male speakers.

questions.question: How do you say 'No' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: नाही (Naahi) means No.

questions.question: What does 'माफ करा' mean?
questions.explanation: माफ करा (Maaf kara) means Sorry or Excuse me.

questions.question: 'पुन्हा भेटू' translates to:
questions.explanation: पुन्हा भेटू (Punhaa bhetoo) means Let's meet again — a warm farewell.

m1-l1.question: How do you say 'Good morning' in Marathi?
A female speaker leaving says:
m1-l1.explanation: येते (Yete) is the casual goodbye said by female speakers.

m1-l1.question: Which greeting is most formal in Marathi?
m1-l1.explanation: नमस्कार (Namaskar) is the most formal and universally appropriate Marathi greeting.

m1-l2.question: Which word means 'Thank you' in Marathi?
m1-l2.explanation: धन्यवाद (Dhanyavaad) is the standard word for Thank you.

m1-l2.question: How do you say 'Please' in Marathi?
What does 'माफ करा' mean?
m1-l2.explanation: माफ करा (Maaf kara) is used to apologize or to say Excuse me.

m1-l3.question: How do you ask 'What is your name?' in Marathi?
m1-l3.explanation: तुमचे नाव काय आहे? (Tumache naav kaay aahe?) means What is your name?

m1-l3.question: How would you say 'My name is Rajan'?
m1-l3.explanation: माझे नाव राजन आहे. (Majhe naav Rajan aahe.) means My name is Rajan.

m1-l3.question: Which phrase means 'Nice to meet you'?
m1-l3.explanation: भेटून आनंद झाला (Bhetoon aanand zhaala) means Nice/happy to meet you.

m1-l4.question: How do you say 'I am from Mumbai'?
m1-l4.explanation: मी मुंबईहून आहे. (Mi Mumbaihoon aahe.) means I am from Mumbai.

m1-l4.question: Which question asks 'Where are you from?'
m1-l4.explanation: तुम्ही कुठून आहात? (Tumhi kuthoon aahat?) means Where are you from?

m1-l4.question: How do you say 'I understand'?
m1-l4.explanation: मला समजते (Mala samajte) means I understand.

m1-l5.question: How do you say 'I don't understand' in Marathi?
m1-l5.explanation: मला समजत नाही (Mala samajat naahi) means I don't understand.

m1-l5.question: Which phrase means 'Please speak slowly'?
m1-l5.explanation: हळू बोला (Haloo bola) means Please speak slowly.

m1-l5.question: 'पुन्हा सांगा' means:
m1-l5.explanation: पुन्हा सांगा (Punhaa saangaa) means Please say it again.

questions.question: What is 'three' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: तीन (Teen) means three.

questions.explanation: किती वाजले? (Kiti vaajle?) is the standard way to ask for the time.

questions.question: Which word means 'Tomorrow'?
questions.explanation: उद्या (Udya) means tomorrow.

questions.explanation: शंभर (Shambhar) means one hundred.

questions.explanation: काल (Kaal) means yesterday in Marathi.

questions.question: What number is 'पाच'?
questions.explanation: पाच (Paach) means five.

questions.question: How do you say 'Twenty' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: वीस (Vees) means twenty.

questions.explanation: आठवडा (Aathavada) means week in Marathi.

questions.question: 'सकाळी' means:
questions.explanation: सकाळी (Sakaali) means in the morning.

questions.question: How do you say 'It is 3 o'clock'?
questions.explanation: तीन वाजले (Teen vaajle) means It is 3 o'clock.

m2-l3.explanation: परवा (Parwaa) means the day after tomorrow.

questions.explanation: मित्र (Mitra) means a male friend or companion.

questions.explanation: काका (Kaakaa) is the Marathi word for paternal uncle.

questions.explanation: बायको (Baayko) means wife in Marathi.

questions.explanation: माझे कुटुंब मोठे आहे. (Majhe kutumb mothe aahe.) means My family is big.

questions.explanation: आजी (Aaji) means Grandmother in Marathi.

questions.explanation: मैत्रीण (Maitreen) is the word for a female friend in Marathi.

questions.explanation: भूक लागली (Bhook laagali) means I am hungry.

questions.explanation: पाणी (Paani) means Water.

questions.explanation: भात (Bhaat) means cooked rice.

options: What do you want to eat?

questions.explanation: गोड (God) means Sweet.

questions.explanation: मला चहा आवडतो (Mala chaha aavdato) means I like tea.

questions.explanation: तहान लागली (Tahaan laagali) means I am thirsty.

questions.question: भाकरी is a type of:
questions.explanation: भाकरी (Bhaakari) is a traditional Maharashtrian flatbread made from sorghum or millet.

questions.explanation: मला पाणी मिळेल का? (Mala paani milel ka?) politely means Can I get some water?

m4-l1.explanation: भूक लागली (Bhook laagali) means I am hungry.

m4-l2.explanation: मला आवडते (Mala aavadte) means I like it.

questions.question: How do you say 'Where is the bus stop?'
questions.explanation: बस स्थानक कुठे आहे? (Bas sthaanak kuthe aahe?) means Where is the bus stop?

questions.question: 'उजवीकडे वळा' means:
questions.explanation: उजवीकडे वळा (Ujavikade valaa) means Turn right.

questions.question: What does 'जवळ' mean?
questions.explanation: जवळ (Javal) means nearby or close.

questions.question: How do you ask 'How far is it?'
questions.explanation: किती अंतर आहे? (Kiti antar aahe?) means How far is it?

questions.question: A रिक्षा is:
questions.explanation: रिक्षा (Rikshaa) is an auto-rickshaw, a common three-wheeled vehicle.

questions.explanation: सरळ जा (Saral jaa) means Go straight.

questions.explanation: रेल्वे स्थानक means Railway station.

questions.question: To say 'Turn left' you say:

m5-l1.explanation: स्थानक कुठे आहे? means Where is the station?

questions.explanation: हे किती रुपयांना आहे? means How much does this cost?

questions.question: What does 'महाग' mean?
questions.explanation: महाग (Mahaag) means expensive.

questions.question: 'थोडे कमी करा' is used when:
questions.explanation: थोडे कमी करा means Please reduce a bit — used when bargaining.

questions.explanation: स्वस्त (Swast) means cheap or affordable.

questions.question: दुकान means:
questions.explanation: दुकान (Dukaan) means shop or store.

questions.question: How do you say 'I don't have money'?

questions.question: बाजार means:
questions.explanation: बाजार (Baazaar) means market.

questions.question: 'मला हे नको' means:

questions.explanation: नाश्ता (Naashta) means Breakfast.

questions.question: The morning routine phrase for 'I brush teeth' is:

questions.question: How do you say 'Every day I go for a walk'?

questions.explanation: आज हवामान कसे आहे? means How is the weather today?

questions.question: डोंगर means:
questions.explanation: डोंगर (Dongar) means hill or mountain.

questions.question: 'उकाडा' describes:

questions.question: What is 'समुद्र'?
questions.explanation: समुद्र (Samudra) means ocean or sea.

questions.question: How do you say 'It is very hot today'?
questions.explanation: आज खूप ऊन आहे. (Aaj khoop oon aahe.) means It is very hot/sunny today.

questions.question: नदी means:
questions.explanation: नदी (Nadi) means river.

questions.question: How do you say 'I love the rain'?
questions.explanation: मला पाऊस आवडतो. (Mala paaus aavadte.) means I love the rain.

questions.question: 'ऊन पडत आहे' means:
questions.explanation: ऊन पडत आहे (Oon padat aahe) means the sun is shining / it is sunny.

m8-l1.question: How do you say 'It is raining'?
m8-l1.explanation: पाऊस पडत आहे means It is raining.

questions.explanation: ताप (Taap) means fever.

questions.explanation: औषध (Aushadh) means medicine.

questions.explanation: रुग्णालय (Rugnalay) is the formal Marathi word for hospital.

questions.explanation: मी विद्यार्थी आहे. (Mi vidyaarthi aahe.) means I am a student.

questions.explanation: मला आनंद आहे. (Mala aanand aahe.) means I am happy.

questions.explanation: राग (Raag) means anger.

questions.explanation: दुःख (Dukh) means sadness or grief.

questions.question: How do you say 'I agree with you'?
questions.explanation: मी तुमच्याशी सहमत आहे. means I agree with you.

questions.explanation: भीती (Bheeti) means fear.

questions.explanation: वाह! खूप छान! (Waah! Khoop chhaan!) is an enthusiastic expression of excitement or admiration.

m11-l1.explanation: मला आनंद आहे. means I am happy.

questions.question: How do you ask 'What do you think?'
questions.explanation: तुमचा विचार काय आहे? (Tumcha vichar kaay aahe?) means What do you think?

questions.question: 'म्हणजे' is used to:
questions.explanation: म्हणजे (Mhanje) means 'that is to say' or 'meaning' — used to clarify.

questions.question: How do you say 'To be honest...'?
questions.explanation: खरे सांगायचे तर (Khare saangaayche tar) means To be honest or Frankly speaking.

questions.question: 'आपण बोलूया' means:
questions.explanation: आपण बोलूया (Aapan bolooyan) means Let's talk.

questions.question: How do you say 'Did you know?'
questions.explanation: तुम्हाला माहीत आहे का? (Tumhaala maahit aahe ka?) means Did you know?

questions.question: 'शेवटी' means:
questions.explanation: शेवटी (Shevati) means finally or at the end.

questions.question: How do you say 'It means...' in Marathi?
questions.explanation: म्हणजे (Mhanje) means 'that is to say' or 'it means'.

questions.question: 'मी सांगतो' is used when:
questions.explanation: मी सांगतो (Mi saangato) means Let me tell you — used to start sharing information.

questions.question: How do you say 'I understand what you mean'?
questions.explanation: मला तुमचा अर्थ समजतो. means I understand what you mean.

questions.question: A good way to start a conversation is:
questions.explanation: आपण बोलूया. (Aapan bolooyan.) means Let's talk — a natural conversation opener.

m12-l1.question: How do you ask 'What do you think?'
m12-l1.explanation: तुमचा विचार काय आहे? means What do you think?

m12-l1.question: 'म्हणजे' is used to:
m12-l1.explanation: म्हणजे (Mhanje) is a connecting word meaning 'that is to say' or 'meaning'.

m12-l1.question: How do you start telling someone something?
m12-l1.explanation: मी सांगतो... (Mi saangato...) means Let me tell you... — a natural story-starter.
